name: Bake Love Feeling
original_name: ขนมปังชีสเนย
overview: Though we got off to a bad start, I hope that we'll get close and that I'll be able to work smoothly with you. I don't know if it's from proximity or what that's making my heart race. I have to keep telling myself that the kindness you've been showing me is only out of obligation, don't take it so seriously!  ~~ Adapted from the novel "Bake Love Feelings" (ขนมปังชีสเนย Bake love feelings) by Snow Leopard (เสือดาวหิมะ).

trailers.title: ขนมปังชีสเนย Bake Love Feeling | GMMTV 2026
